Title: Goddess of Life
Sacrifice Reward: 50% chance: Greater/Superior Healing Potion. 50% chance: heal 80 HP + 50 MP.
Pray T3 (after 5 sacrifices): Heal full HP + full MP + clear all status effects

Title: God of the Wild
Sacrifice Reward: 30% rare fey ingredient. Else gold = item value × 3-6.
Pray T2 (after 3 sacrifices): Wind Step — teleport to a random discovered tile
Pray T3 (after 5 sacrifices): Spawn a Fey Garden somewhere on this floor

Title: God of Wisdom
Sacrifice Reward: 40% upgrade scroll. Else random spell/identification scroll.
Pray T1 (after 1 sacrifice): Identify all unidentified items in inventory
Pray T2 (after 3 sacrifices): Identify all + reveal BUC on all equipped gear
Pray T3 (after 5 sacrifices): Identify all + BUC reveal + drop a random spell scroll

Title: God of the Forge
Sacrifice Reward: Offered weapon +1-3 upgrades returned. 25% bonus upgrade scroll.
Pray T1 (after 1 sacrifice): Repair one sealed weapon in inventory
Pray T3 (after 5 sacrifices): Bless equipped weapon (+4 upgrades) + drop upgrade scroll

Title: Goddess of Protection
Sacrifice Reward: Offered armor +1-3 upgrades returned. 25% bonus upgrade scroll.
Pray T2 (after 3 sacrifices): Bless equipped armor (+3 upgrades) + reveal nearby rooms
Pray T3 (after 5 sacrifices): Bless equipped armor (+4 upgrades) + ward charge (block next major hit)

Title: God of Fortune
Sacrifice Reward: Item value ≥200 → 80% good outcome (upgrade scroll / ×4-8 gold / +1-3 stat / better item). Else 50% good.
Pray T0 (free baseline): Wildcard: small random buff or 5-50 gold
Pray T1 (after 1 sacrifice): Roll the Dice: random reward (+1 stat / +50 gold / +20 HP)
Pray T2 (after 3 sacrifices): Coin Flip: 50% double current gold, 50% lose half
Pray T3 (after 5 sacrifices): Trickster's Boon — drop a random rare item (level ≥10)

Title: The Cleanser
Sacrifice Reward: Raw stat boost (+1-2 random stat) + small max HP
Pray T1 (after 1 sacrifice): Remove curse from one equipped item
Pray T2 (after 3 sacrifices): Unseal one sealed item in inventory (becomes uncursed)
Pray T3 (after 5 sacrifices): Cleanse all sealed/cursed items in inventory

Title: God of Fortitude
Sacrifice Reward: 50% +stat (str/dex/int) + max HP. Else gold + max HP.

Pray T3 (after 5 sacrifices): Auto-drops in inventory when ALL 8 gods reach T3 (40 successful sacrifices total)

Notes: Wrong type = rejected, item returned, altar NOT consumed. Right type = +1 piety, reward, altar consumed.
Always tappable. Claims current tier reward (T0 if no piety). Altar consumed.
